query: soft focus dreamy out of focus defocused portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: soft focus dreamy defocused portraits

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a person with long straight blonde hair and bangs, fair skin, visible green eyes, and light pink lips slightly parted in a gentle smile. The subject is positioned slightly left of center, looking toward the right side of the frame. The background consists of out-of-focus circular bokeh light effects in soft lavender, pale pink, and white tones. The visible portion of the subject includes the left eye, nose, lips, and chin, with the right side of the face extending beyond the frame edge. Large soft circular light shapes overlay the left portion and bottom edge of the image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A deliberately soft-focus close-up portrait of a person with long straight blonde hair and bangs, where intentional blur and dreamy bokeh effects dominate the frame. The subject's face is partially obscured by large out-of-focus circular light orbs and hazy diffusion that washes across the left side and bottom of the image, with the right side of the face cropped out of frame. The visible green eye, nose, and gentle smile emerge through the ethereal haze against a muted background of pale lavender and pink bokeh circles. The faded, low-contrast palette and apparent light leak effects create an intimate, lo-fi aesthetic with an obstructed, snapshot-like composition that withholds part of the subject from view.
